message:
fix: resolve clippy warnings and apply formatting fixes

Remove unused serde_json import in fj_durability.rs, replace
cloned_ref_to_slice_refs patterns in pe_staging_oracle.rs with
std::slice::from_ref, and apply rustfmt/clippy auto-fixes to
shape manipulation kernels in fj-lax. Regenerated test artifacts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
